problem id: 563c1afa
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  01000100 -> 00110111
  01100101 -> 01100101
  10011011 -> 01111001
  00111011 -> 00111001
  10101100 -> 01100111
  00000000 -> 11111111
  11010100 -> 00010111
  00010111 -> 10100001

query: 00000110
predicted answer: 10010011
